provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Public Recreation Grounds (Morogoro Municipality) Order, 2003.

Each of the areas of Public land in Morogofo Municipality de­scribed in the schedule hereto is hereby declared to be Public Recre­ation Grounds Ordinance. Schedule All that area of land in block 'EE' within Morogoro Municipality identified as plots No.32, 33, 34, 35, 36, and 39 on Town Planning drawing No. 10/148/679 deposited by the Director of Human Settlements Development, Ministry of Lands and Human Settlements Development. All that area of land in block 'D' within Morogoro Municipality identified as plots No. 373, 516, 69, 114, 231 and 498 on Town Planning drawing No. 10/175/395 deposited by the Director of Human Settlements Development, Ministry of lands and Human Settlement Development. All that area of land in block 'E' Tungi within Morogoro Municipality identified as plot No.733 on Town Planning drawing No. 10/178/996 deposited by the Director of Human Settlements Development, Ministry of Lands and Human Settlements Development. All that area of land in block 'A' Tungi within Morogoro Municipality identified as plots No. 813, 850, 851 and 914 on Town Planning drawing No. 10/170/1091 deposited by the Director of Human Settlements Development, Ministry' of Lands na Human Settlements Development. All that area of land in block 'A' Tungi within Morogoro Municipality Identified as plots No. 813. 850, 851 and 914 on Town planning drawing No. 10/170/1091 deposited by the Director of Human Settlements Development. Ministry of Lands and Human Settlements Development.
